mapper.select: SELECT id, email, username, password, first_name AS firstName, last_name AS lastName, telephone, user_type AS userType, expire_date AS expired, is_active AS isActive, permission_version AS permissionVersion FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, email, username, password, first_name AS firstName, last_name AS lastName, telephone, user_type AS userType, expire_date AS expired, is_active AS isActive, permission_version AS permissionVersion FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, email, username, password, first_name AS firstName, last_name AS lastName, telephone, user_type AS userType, expire_date AS expired, is_active AS isActive, permission_version AS permissionVersion FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT hospital_id FROM user_hospitals WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY is_default DESC, id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT code FROM hospitals WHERE id = #{hospitalId} LIMIT 1
SELECT permission_version FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
